title: poa hemipoa
side_effects: Poa hemipoa can have side effects if used improperly, such as causing gastrointestinal issues, allergic reactions, and skin irritation in some individuals. If ingested in large quantities, it can lead to symptoms like nausea, vomiting, and stomach pain. Additionally, improper use of this plant can also trigger anaphylaxis in severe cases, requiring immediate medical attention. Furthermore, skin contact with the plant's sap can cause redness, itching, and burning sensations.
